title: Biden admin used $500,000 missile to shoot down ‘UFO’ –that turned out to be Boy Scouts balloon
description: One of the supposedly sensational videos showing UFOs released by the Department of War actually showed a Boy Scout balloon being blown apart by a $500,000 missile.

title: ‘No replies should be sent’: Scientists issue alien contact protocol after government declassifies top-secret UFO files
description: Don't talk to extraterrestrial strangers, they warn.

title: The secret UFO files
description: From Apollo astronauts039 dispatches to modern military footage newly released files by the Trump administration reopen the debate over unidentified flying objects and other anomalous phenomena

title: US released secret UFO files, so why won't UK do the same?
description: Investigator urges U.K. to follow U.S. lead in launching probe into UFOsWeeks ago, when the U.S. government dropped a batch of files on UFOs, a firestorm was kicked off.Now, a leading paranormal investigator is demanding that the U.K. follow the lead and launch a probe into the mystery objects in...

title: Washington archdiocese cuts ties with exorcist over UFO, demon comments
description: Monsignor Stephen Rossetti was removed as an exorcist after saying he believed that many "UFO sightings are in fact demons."
